rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use implementation annexes for bindings that depend on subcomponent connections or features.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL scopes matching component type or implementation.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the input AADL model.
Only include assumptions and guarantees that reference visible features or ports from the AADL model.
Avoid generating bounds or constraints not explicitly stated in the requirement.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `const` for named limits and `eq` for boolean range expressions in contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are abstracted through valid variables.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
